case_title: JOSE ALBERTO GARCIA MARTINEZ VS. PALMERA CONSTRUCTION CO.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA MARTINEZ, JOSE ALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT PALMERA CONSTRUCTION CO., A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA MARTINEZ, JOSE ALBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMERA CONSTRUCTION CO., A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $10,287.23 PRINCIPAL, $1,103.48 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,760.71, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
